summary: Large Pokemon Stadium stage decompilation PR: replaced most of src/melee/gr/grstadium.c placeholder coverage with matched C, added 53 new matches according to the decomp.dev report, and left 8 functions still close but not fully matched due to regswaps or unresolved SISLib/jumbotron text typing. The PR also matched Ground_801C2FE0, refactored Ground's stage-specific storage toward a documented u union for object subtypes, shared UnkArchiveStruct between grAnime and datfile handling, and corrected several related prototypes and symbol data classifications.

key_files.reason: Main PR target; expanded from mostly placeholders to a large Pokemon Stadium implementation with stage callbacks, jumbotron/camera/text handling, asserts using grpstadium.c, helper inlines, and many newly matched functions.
Updated Pokemon Stadium declarations and header guard naming around the newly implemented stage code.
Added detailed Pokemon Stadium Ground subtype structs, including grStadium_GroundVars, grStadium_type9_GroundVars, and grStadium_Display, and introduced the documented Ground.u subtype union.
Matched Ground_801C2FE0 and integrated datfile/stage collision update logic using UnkArchiveStruct and mpLib state.
Removed local Foo archive struct in favor of shared UnkArchiveStruct and changed memzero to sizeof(*arg0).
Added grAnime_801C65B0(UnkArchiveStruct*) declaration and switched to forward declarations needed by the shared type.
Adjusted rodata/data symbol sizes and data kinds, splitting several Pokemon Stadium data ranges into strings, SJIS, float arrays, and jump tables.
Changed grLib_801C96F8 generator position parameter from S32Vec3* to Vec3*, enabling cleanup of suspicious casts in stage callers.
Changed gm_80160968 return type from int to U8Vec4 to model packed color data used by stadium/jumbotron logic.

what_changed: Implemented most of Pokemon Stadium's stage code in grstadium.c, adding 2271 lines and replacing many placeholder markers.
decomp.dev reported matched code increased by 10824 bytes and 53 new matches, mostly in main/melee/gr/grstadium, plus a new match for Ground_801C2FE0.
Left 8 Pokemon Stadium functions improved but still unmatched; the PR body says they are close and blocked by regswaps or SISLib type work for jumbotron text handling.
Added Pokemon Stadium-specific Ground subtype data: grStadium_GroundVars, grStadium_type9_GroundVars, and grStadium_Display for the jumbotron.
Introduced a documented Ground.u union for subtype-specific Ground object storage, while keeping the older gv union and noting that prior members should move later.
Matched Ground_801C2FE0 as a bool-returning function taking Ground_GObj*, with logic that touches stage data, grDatFiles_801C6330, and mpLib_80055E9C/mpLib_8004D17C state.
Replaced grAnime.c's file-local Foo struct with shared UnkArchiveStruct, supporting the PR body's note that Pokemon Stadium loads transformations from disk and bridges grAnime with datfile handling.
Changed UnkArchiveStruct.unk8 from s32 to u32 and reused sizeof(*arg0) when clearing it.
Corrected generator/vector APIs from S32Vec3* to Vec3* in grLib_801C96F8 and callers such as grGreatBay, grIzumi, and grTMario.
Corrected gm_80160968 to return U8Vec4 and moved lbl_803B7864 from a local static int array declaration to an external const U8Vec4 array.
Updated symbols.txt to refine Pokemon Stadium data layout, including separate lbl_803E13xx/lbl_803E15xx strings, SJIS data, float data, and corrected object sizes.
smart_moves: Used assert strings to name and justify the new Ground.u union; the Doxygen comment explicitly records known subtype member names from asserts and gives future refactor direction.

Separated Pokemon Stadium's jumbotron Ground data into grStadium_Display rather than overloading the generic grStadium_GroundVars, making subtype-specific fields such as text display, camera feeds, focused player, and camera box explicit.

Promoted grAnime's temporary Foo archive struct into the shared UnkArchiveStruct because Pokemon Stadium revealed that granime and datfile loading use the same disk-loaded transformation/archive shape.
Preserved matching-sensitive type choices in comments, e.g. Ground_801C2FE0 notes that map_id must be int because using an enum changes codegen from addi to mr.
Converted packed RGBA color data to U8Vec4 instead of int, improving semantic type accuracy for downstream users.
Removed dubious S32Vec3 casts by correcting grLib_801C96F8 and stage caller prototypes to Vec3*, making float vector usage explicit.
Split symbols.txt ranges into smaller string/SJIS/float labels, which helps data matching and makes the jumbotron text assets more searchable.
Documented unresolved matching blockers inline, including SISLib type expansion and variadic float upcast issues, instead of hiding them behind vague placeholders.
decomp_lessons: Stage Ground objects can use different data subtypes per StageCallbacks entry; model this as a subtype union when assert strings and callback usage prove different layouts.

Do not keep one-off archive structs in subsystem files when a stage shows the same archive/datfile shape is shared; promote the shared structure and include it through appropriate forward/type headers.
Packed color tables should be typed as small byte-vector structs such as U8Vec4 when consumers treat them as RGBA bytes, not as int constants.
When matching PowerPC output, enum-vs-int can affect instruction selection; leave comments on deliberate primitive type choices that are only for matching.
Vector parameter cleanup can remove suspicious casts: if stage generator calls pass floating Vec3 data, fix the API to Vec3* rather than casting through S32Vec3*.
Data symbol splitting matters for matching large stage files: distinguish strings, SJIS strings, floats, jump tables, and object size boundaries in symbols.txt.
Filename-sensitive asserts may require the source filename string to be documented or eventually aligned; this PR notes grstadium.c should be named grpstadium.c for asserts.
SISLib-heavy functions may remain near-match until text/window structs and variadic argument behavior are better typed; isolate those as follow-up type work.
naming_conventions: Pokemon Stadium functions use the grStadium_801Dxxxx prefix in C, while data symbols use grPs_803Exxxx/grPs_804Dxxxx naming.
The assert/source filename string for Pokemon Stadium appears as "grpstadium.c", and the PR adds a TODO that the file should be named grpstadium.c for asserts.
The new Ground subtype union is named u based on assert evidence, with members such as stadium, stadium9, and display.
Older stage-specific Ground storage remains under gv, with a TODO that previous Ground.gv members should eventually move into the new subtype union approach.
Unknown Pokemon Stadium subtype for IDs 6 and 9 is named grStadium_type9_GroundVars, explicitly marking uncertainty.
The jumbotron subtype is named grStadium_Display and uses field comments to describe text display, stage camera feed, zoomed camera feed, focused player, and CameraBox.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Ground_801C2FE0 uses int map_id instead of an enum because the author observed enum codegen produces mr rather than the needed addi.

Inline helper functions were introduced locally for matching, including randi, randi_between, randi_between_2, mul_vec, and jobj traversal helpers, with TODOs to move common ones to random.h or jobj.h later.
Pokemon Stadium assert calls use literal "grpstadium.c" and exact line/assert strings, indicating assert evidence drove both code shape and type/member naming.
Unmatched jumbotron/SISLib functions are near-match but affected by regswaps and incomplete SISLib type knowledge per the PR body.
The PR notes variadic SISLib calls may upcast floats to double, so float constant handling around those calls remains a matching concern.
Using shared UnkArchiveStruct and sizeof(*arg0) in grAnime_801C65B0 reduced hardcoded struct-size assumptions while preserving behavior.

review_feedback.feedback: 8 functions remain; they are close but still have regswaps or require more SISLib type work for jumbotron text handling.
The Ground struct union refactor is intentional, documented above the new u union, and expected to be applied to other stages later.
Reported +10824 matched bytes, 53 new matches, and 8 improved unmatched functions for GALE01.
No human review comments were present in the provided slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename grstadium.c or otherwise address grpstadium.c assert filename matching.
Search for subsequent Ground.u union refactors moving older Ground.gv stage members into the documented subtype union.
Search for SISLib type expansion PRs that resolve Pokemon Stadium jumbotron text functions.
Inspect later changes to grStadium_801D4548, grStadium_801D3460, grStadium_801D435C, grStadium_801D2A60, grStadium_801D3BBC, grStadium_801D3138, fn_801D2FD0, and fn_801D3084.
Search for randi/jobj helper inlines being moved to random.h or jobj.h.
Search for additional UnkArchiveStruct users after this PR to validate the shared grAnime/datfiles model.
